message:
fix(abi): track hsearch_r filled count, depth-limit regex NFA epsilon closure, and simplify UTF-8 range check

search_abi: hsearch_r was not incrementing htab.filled on successful ENTER,
so heuristic resize decisions based on load factor were wrong. Now checks
whether the key already exists before ENTER, and increments filled only for
genuine new insertions. Three new tests verify filled tracking: lifecycle
filled count, duplicate ENTER idempotence, and hdestroy_r reset.

regex: The Pike VM's add_thread epsilon-closure recursion had no depth limit,
meaning deeply nested alternations or long epsilon chains (Jump/Split) could
overflow the stack. Adds ADD_THREAD_MAX_DEPTH (256) and an add_thread_inner
helper that stops recursion when depth exceeds the limit. The NFA size already
bounds total work (duplicate-PC pruning), but this prevents stack overflow.

wchar_abi: Replaces `cp < 0x10000 || cp > 0x10FFFF` with the idiomatic
`!(0x10000..=0x10FFFF).contains(&cp)` per clippy suggestion.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
